title: Bank Cashier
description: We are seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Bank Cashier to join our team in Kathmandu. The ideal candidate will handle cash transactions, deposits, withdrawals, and account inquiries with accuracy and professionalism. Responsibilities include maintaining accurate records, balancing cash drawers, assisting customers with routine banking services, and ensuring compliance with banking regulations. The role requires excellent communication skills and a commitment to delivering exceptional customer service.
requirements: Candidates must have a minimum of a Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related field. Prior experience in banking or cash handling is preferred. Strong numerical aptitude, attention to detail, and proficiency in MS Office are essential. Knowledge of banking software and familiarity with local financial regulations will be an added advantage.

title: Assistant Manager – IT
description: A fast-growing IT company is looking for an Assistant Manager to support the management team in overseeing daily operations, project coordination, and team performance. The Assistant Manager will assist in planning and executing IT projects, ensuring timely delivery, monitoring KPIs, and collaborating with cross-functional teams. The role also involves mentoring junior staff, optimizing workflows, and contributing to strategic decision-making to support business growth.
requirements: The ideal candidate should hold a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field. A minimum of 3–5 years of experience in IT project management or team coordination is preferred. Strong leadership, problem-solving, and communication skills are essential. Familiarity with software development lifecycles, project management tools, and IT operations will be highly valued.
